name: Global Uniques
uniques: Instantly provides [1] [Bool Mobilization1] <upon turn start> <when number of [Bool Mobilization1] is equal to [0]> <when number of [Bool Mobilization2] is equal to [0]> <when number of [Bool Mobilization3] is equal to [0]> <when number of [Bool Mobilization4] is equal to [0]>
